text:
/ci1 1 t3 大振りの攻撃は
ちゃんと避けないとだね！
衝撃が強くて吹き飛ばされちゃう。

/ci1 1 t3 We won't be able to completely avoid
a sweeping attack, though! The impact would
be strong, and we'd get blown away.
